cookieBanner.title: Cookies & tracking
cookieBanner.body: We use cookies and third-party services (Stay22 for hotel prices, GetYourGuide for tours, Google Analytics, Google AdSense) to load content, analyse usage and show relevant offers. Choose what you want to allow. Details in our privacy policy.

home.eyebrow: Oldest city in Germany - UNESCO World Heritage
home.heroBody: From Porta Nigra (the Black Gate) to Trier Cathedral, from the Roman Amphitheatre to the Olewig (a wine village within Trier) vineyards. Trier-Reisen is your city guide for UNESCO World Heritage, Mosel wine and Roman heritage.
home.unescoBody: Eight UNESCO sites within a few square kilometres. These six landmarks anchor every trip to Trier.
home.districtsBody: From the UNESCO old town to the wine village of Olewig, from the Moselle promenade to the university district of Kürenz.
home.upcomingBody: Antikenfestspiele (Roman theatre festival), Olewiger Weinfest (wine festival) and the Christmas market: Trier's major events.
